title: qcthat 1.0.0
text: series QC*() functions generate QC reports different sets issues: QCPackage() issues tests R package associated GitHub repository (#46, #69). QCCompletedIssues() issues closed completed (#69, #80). QCIssues() specific issues (#86), QCMilestones() issues associated specific named milestones (#68, #88) QCPR() issues associated specific GitHub pull requests, QCMergeGH() generalize issues associated GitHub merge using GitHub’s graph determine connections, QCMergeLocal() detect probable associations based commit messages (#68, #84). series Action_*() functions set GitHub actions QC reports: Action_QCCompletedIssues() run QCCompletedIssues() (#69, #73). Action_QCPRIssues() run QCPR() specific pull requests (#55, #68). Action_QCMilestone() run QCMilestones() pull requests associated milestones, releases names match milestones (#68, #88).
